title: Caprese Skewers
description: Cherry tomatoes, fresh mozzarella, and basil on toothpicks with a balsamic glaze drizzle. The easiest appetizer that always looks good on a platter.

instructions.text: Thread a cherry tomato, a mozzarella ball, and a folded basil leaf onto each toothpick or small skewer.
Arrange on a platter and drizzle with balsamic glaze. Finish with a pinch of flaky salt and black pepper if desired.

notes:
Can be assembled up to 1 hour ahead and refrigerated -- bring to room temperature before serving for best flavor.

Ciliegine (small) or bocconcini (medium) mozzarella balls are the right size for skewers. Avoid the large fresh mozzarella log.

Store-bought balsamic glaze works fine. To make your own, simmer balsamic vinegar in a small saucepan over medium-low heat until reduced by half and syrupy.
